narrative:
Crestline 3A (precinct in Crawford County) has 652 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
